title: MajorZwey's Better Bow
description: This resource pack makes the bow 32x32 and it adds colours to the pulling animation for better visibility.
body:
[![Discord Server Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325a89553e2cccaaac1327a84a2b339a0c1d7ff6.webp)](https://discord.gg/MY8YtmtC3M)     [![Youtube Channel Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca2512fe8cab08fdafee0d8f64757a0b29d57c7.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@MajorZwey)

# Overview
This resuorce pack makes the bow 32x32 and it adds colors to the pulling animation for better visibility.
# Features
- 32x32 resolution
- Improved visibility on the pulling animation.
#  My Other packs
[MajorZwey's Blue Hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-hearts-by-majorzwey)

[MajorZwey's Better Obsidian](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/majorzweys-better-obsidian)

[MajorZwey's Blue crits](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/majorzweys-blue-crits)

[MajorZwey's Visible Axe](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/majorzweys-visible-axe)
# Incompatibilities
This resource pack is currently incompatible with the [Real Arrow Tip](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-arrow-tip) mod, which changes bow textures depending on the arrow you are currntly shooting.
So if you're shooting tipped arrows, spectral arrows this texture pack **won't work.**
